params.name: Arianrhod's Wheel
params.description: The Wheel is a symbol of the star goddess in ancient Welsh mythology, representing the waxing and waning of the moon in the sky. The divinity of Arianrhod is closely linked to the cyclical movement of the moon, and her strength shines like a full moon, guiding the cycle and changes of life. It has become a symbol of reincarnation in ancient Celtic, and the turning of the Wheel of signifies the twists of fate and the inheritance of Wisdom, like moonlight spreading across the earth, continuously s …
